required_rule: native or selected temporal-basis utility beats current CRA by >=10% on aggregate or on the locked target task, with no material regression >10% on Mackey/NARMA and clean shuffle guards
candidate beats or cleanly separates from random-projection and nonlinear-lag controls, internal ablations hurt, shuffle guards fail, and compact regression passes
if utility fails, regressions appear, or controls show leakage, do not promote; park or redesign through a new contract
